title: Remote input-asset transfer: video/audio/latent upload (non-image inputs)
description: Remote input-asset transfer for non-image inputs (video/audio media upload, trimmed-clip upload, and preview-.latent staging round-trip). Code shipped in committed e46a02b (MPI-64 Step 5.1); the card text claiming 'uncommitted/not wired' was stale. All three legs VERIFIED LIVE 2026-06-17: legs 1+2 via a trimmed-video remote upscale on an L4 (v0.4.7), leg 3 via a full remote-origin multi-stage flow (preview + 2x Continue-From + in-place continue + delete) on an L40S ephemeral Pod (v0.4.8). See validation.md. One edge case carved off to MPI-108 (local-origin preview latent wiped when an ephemeral Pod restarts for a node install). App.
